title: Monday.com Integration with Excel and/or OfficeTrax

posts.author: jscrutchin (Jay Scrutchin)
posts.cookedHtml: We are seeking developer support to assist with integrating Monday.com and OfficeTrax. Monday is our Project Management software for managing repair work orders for retail client infrastructure, and OfficeTrax is the platform used by our largest client to dispatch work orders to us.

posts.author: Adam_Integration (Adam Reavill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jay,

We’re a Global Gold Monday.Com partner with over 20 years specialising in Workflow, Content and Integration in many industries.

We work with our own Integration Platform and with ‘Make’ to achieve seamless user experiences across their preferred platforms.

If you would like a quick call to see how we can help, please drop me a line Adam.reavill@iointegration.com

Thanks.
Adam Reavill
